Option 2) No prior reconstituting: Simply sprinkle a handful into any recipe being cooked, like soup or rice etc. Enjoy! Product Description: Gourmet Dried Pumpkin Dices by Its Delish

Dried Pumpkin Pieces are the perfect addition to your favorite Thanksgiving recipes and other vegetable dishes. Our dried pumpkin pieces are made from the finest pumpkins, ensuring you get the freshness and flavor you want. With a sweet and earthy flavor, these pumpkin pieces are great for adding a unique twist to your favorite dishes.

Whether you’re making pumpkin pie, risotto, soup, or rice dishes, our dried pumpkin pieces are sure to add an extra bit of flavor and texture. They’re also vegan and kosher, making them a great choice for those with dietary restrictions. Plus, they’re easy to prepare – just add them to your favorite recipes and enjoy!

Order your Dried Pumpkin Pieces today and experience the delicious flavor of pumpkin in every bite. You’ll love the freshness and flavor of our dried pumpkin pieces, and your family will love how delicious your recipes turn out. Try them today and experience the difference!

About It's Delish!

It's Delish was established in 1992 and is located in North Hollywood, California. It's Delish is a food manufacturer and distributor who produces over 500 gourmet food products including licorice, sour belts, taffies, caramels, Jordan almonds, chocolates, nuts, fruits, trail mixes, spices, and the spice blends. It's Delish also produces organics and all natural products. We give you the opportunity to order from the factory direct!

It’s Delish! prides itself on the four pillars that are at the foundation of everything we do.

Bullet Point 1: CRAB FLAVOR – Try a tasty seafood soup with Simply Food’s Instant Crab Flavored Glass Vermicelli Noodles! (Mien Cua) An umami broth seasoned to perfection with crab flavors, cilantro, onion, ginger, garlic, and chili mimicking a traditional Vietnamese styled soup called Miến Cua.
Bullet Point 2: PREMIUM GLASS NOODLES – With over 60 years of experience in noodles, Simply Food’s glass noodles are perfectly formulated to absorb the flavorful, seafood flavors from the crab broth. When cooked thoroughly, these mung bean noodles appear glass-like and transparent with a chewy texture and are subtle tasting making it the perfect noodle to compliment the tasty crab broth!
Bullet Point 3: HEALTHIER NOODLES –These noodles are not flash fried like traditional instant ramen noodles making it a healthier alternative. Glass Vermicelli Noodles are Gluten-Free with no Trans-fat and no Cholesterol and are made with simple ingredients: mung bean flour, salt, and water.
Bullet Point 4: QUICK AND EASY – All you need to prepare and enjoy this instant Crab Glass Noodle Soup is to add hot water and wait 3-5 minutes! These instant glass noodle soups are a fast and easy, convenient meal for any activity on-the-go.
Bullet Point 5: SNACK OR MEAL – Have this instant glass noodle bowl as a quick snack or elevate it further by adding your favorite choice of protein, vegetables, and aromatic herbs!
Bullet Point 6: 9 BOWLS IN A BOX – Each box contains 9 bowls of Instant Crab Glass Vermicelli Noodle Bowls. 55 grams in each bowl!
Product Description: Dive into a delicious bowl of instant crab flavored glass noodles with Simply Food. This instant glass vermicelli noodle bowl features an umami broth made with crab and seafood flavors and chewy, transparent vermicelli noodles. Enjoy as a quick snack or add your favorite seafood to create a full delicious meal! Each box has 9 bowls and contains 55 grams. The glass vermicelli noodles are Gluten-Free, No Trans-fat, and No Cholesterol.
